# A Break-Out Game generated by codex.


# Neo Breakout

A single-file retro breakout game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

## Play

Use the paddle to keep the brass ball in play and break all bricks to advance to the next level.

Controls:

- `←` / `→`: Move paddle
- Mouse / touch: Move paddle
- `Space`: Launch or pause
- `R`: Restart

## Features

- Retro brick-wall visual style
- Countdown before launch
- Score, lives, level, and best score tracking
- Combo bonus popups
- Reinforced bricks that take multiple hits
- Collectible power-up badges:
  - `BIG`: wider paddle
  - `SLOW`: slower ball
  - `X2`: extra balls
  - `LIFE`: extra life
  - `BOOM`: breaks nearby bricks

## Run Locally

Open `index.html` directly in a browser.

No build step, dependencies, or server required.

## Deploy

This game works well with GitHub Pages. Put the game in `index.html`, enable GitHub Pages from the repository settings, and share the published URL.
